title: cyathea cystolepis
intro: Cyathea cystolepis, also known as the Cystolepis fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Cyatheaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyathea cystolepis include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
